applied_terms: “Roundup”译为“综述”或“盘点”比“总结”更贴切，需体现汇编和评述性质。
“trinity”译为“三巨头”或“三驾马车”以保持比喻色彩，避免直译“三位一体”可能带来的宗教联想。
保持引言部分的权威性和前瞻性语气。

understanding.role_in_article: 确立文章主题与范围，介绍ISSCC 2026在年度半导体会议中的定位，并预告后续章节结构。
understanding.relation_to_next: 为后续详细的技术章节（如内存）提供宏观背景和逻辑入口。
key_points: ISSCC是年度三大半导体会议（IEDM、VLSI、ISSCC）之一，本文完成对该系列的全面覆盖。
本文将重点评述内存、光网络、高速电互连、处理器等关键领域。
translation_notes: “Roundup”译为“综述”或“盘点”比“总结”更贴切，需体现汇编和评述性质。
“trinity”译为“三巨头”或“三驾马车”以保持比喻色彩，避免直译“三位一体”可能带来的宗教联想。
保持引言部分的权威性和前瞻性语气。

issues.description: 术语翻译与指南建议不完全一致。指南建议译为‘三巨头’或‘三驾马车’，译文使用了‘三巨头’。但‘trinity’在原文中是一个比喻，指代三个会议构成的整体。译文‘完成了这‘三巨头’的报道’在逻辑上稍显别扭，因为‘三巨头’通常指代三个实体（如三家公司），而这里‘完成报道’的对象是‘ISSCC 2026’这个会议，而非三个会议本身。
译文‘并配有清晰的测量数据和结果’中的‘和结果’为原文‘data’的意译，虽无大碍，但‘数据’本身已隐含‘结果’之意。‘测量数据’已足够清晰，增加‘结果’略显冗余。
根据指南要求，‘首次出现的重要缩写需加注中文全称’。译文直接使用了‘HBM4、LPDDR6、GDDR7 和 NAND’，未在首次出现时提供中文全称或解释。
译文‘涵盖的主题范围广泛，从...到...，以及来自...的先进处理器。’结构清晰。但‘来自联发科、AMD、英伟达和微软等公司的先进处理器’这一长定语可以稍作优化，使其更符合中文将修饰语前置但避免过长的习惯。
译文‘在本综述中，我们将涵盖几个主要类别，例如内存、光网络、高速电气互连和处理器。’中，‘几个’和‘例如’在语义上略有重叠，且‘例如’后的列举是穷举式（对应原文的‘such as’，但中文语境下常直接列举），可以更简洁。

paragraphs.source: There are three major semiconductor conferences each year, IEDM, VLSI and finally ISSCC. We have covered the former two in great detail over the past few years. Today, we finally complete the trinity with our roundup on ISSCC 2026.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: There are three major semiconductor conferences each year, [IEDM](https://newsletter.semianalysis.com/p/interconnects-beyond-copper-1000), [VLSI](https://newsletter.semianalysis.com/p/vlsi2025) and finally ISSCC. We have covered the former two in great detail over the past few years. Today, we finally complete the trinity with our roundup on ISSCC 2026.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: There are three major semiconductor conferences each year, IEDM, VLSI and finally ISSCC. We have covered the former two in great detail over the past few years. Today, we finally complete the trinity with our roundup on ISSCC 2026.

pro.text: 每年有三个主要的半导体会议：国际电子器件会议（IEDM）、超大规模集成电路（VLSI）研讨会，以及 ISSCC。过去几年，我们已经详细报道了前两个会议。今天，我们终于通过对 ISSCC 2026 的综述，完成了对这半导体会议“三巨头”的系列报道。
pro.tokenized_text: 每年有三个主要的半导体会议：[[[LINK_1|国际电子器件会议（IEDM）]]]、[[[LINK_2|超大规模集成电路（VLSI）研讨会]]]，以及 ISSCC。过去几年，我们已经详细报道了前两个会议。今天，我们终于通过对 ISSCC 2026 的综述，完成了对这半导体会议“三巨头”的系列报道。

default.text: 半导体行业每年有三大顶级学术会议：国际电子器件会议、超大规模集成电路以及 ISSCC。过去几年，我们已对前两者进行了深入详尽的报道。今天，我们终于完成这一“三巨头”的收官之作，带来 ISSCC 2026 的全面盘点。

paragraphs.source: Compared to IEDM and VLSI, ISSCC has a much bigger focus on integration and circuits. Almost every paper comes with some form of circuit diagram, together with clear measurements and data.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Compared to IEDM and VLSI, ISSCC has a much bigger focus on integration and circuits. Almost every paper comes with some form of circuit diagram, together with clear measurements and data.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Compared to IEDM and VLSI, ISSCC has a much bigger focus on integration and circuits. Almost every paper comes with some form of circuit diagram, together with clear measurements and data.

pro.text: 与国际电子器件会议和超大规模集成电路研讨会相比，ISSCC 更侧重于集成与电路。几乎每篇论文都附带了某种形式的电路图，并配有清晰的测量数据。

paragraphs.source: In past years, ISSCC findings have been hit or miss when it comes to industry impact. This year was different, a significant number of papers and presentations were directly relevant to market trends. Topics covered range from the latest advancements in HBM4, LPDDR6, GDDR7, and NAND, to co-packaged optics, advanced die-to-die interfaces, and advanced processors from the likes of MediaTek, AMD, Nvidia, and Microsoft.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In past years, ISSCC findings have been hit or miss when it comes to industry impact. This year was different, a significant number of papers and presentations were directly relevant to market trends. Topics covered range from the latest advancements in HBM4, LPDDR6, GDDR7, and NAND, to co-packaged optics, advanced die-to-die interfaces, and advanced processors from the likes of MediaTek, AMD, Nvidia, and Microsoft.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In past years, ISSCC findings have been hit or miss when it comes to industry impact. This year was different, a significant number of papers and presentations were directly relevant to market trends. Topics covered range from the latest advancements in HBM4, LPDDR6, GDDR7, and NAND, to co-packaged optics, advanced die-to-die interfaces, and advanced processors from the likes of MediaTek, AMD, Nvidia, and Microsoft.

pro.text: 过去几年，ISSCC 的研究成果对产业界的影响时好时坏。今年则有所不同，有相当数量的论文和演示与市场趋势直接相关。涵盖的主题范围广泛，从高带宽内存第四代（HBM4）、低功耗双倍数据率第六代（LPDDR6）、图形用双倍数据率第七代（GDDR7）以及 NAND 闪存的最新进展，到共封装光学、先进的裸片到裸片互连接口，再到联发科、AMD、英伟达和微软等公司推出的先进处理器。

applied_terms: “Roundup”译为“综述”或“盘点”比“总结”更贴切，需体现汇编和评述性质。
“trinity”译为“三巨头”或“三驾马车”以保持比喻色彩，避免直译“三位一体”可能带来的宗教联想。
保持引言部分的权威性和前瞻性语气。

understanding.role_in_article: 确立文章主题与范围，介绍ISSCC 2026在年度半导体会议中的定位，并预告后续章节结构。
understanding.relation_to_next: 为后续详细的技术章节（如内存）提供宏观背景和逻辑入口。
key_points: ISSCC是年度三大半导体会议（IEDM、VLSI、ISSCC）之一，本文完成对该系列的全面覆盖。
本文将重点评述内存、光网络、高速电互连、处理器等关键领域。
translation_notes: “Roundup”译为“综述”或“盘点”比“总结”更贴切，需体现汇编和评述性质。
“trinity”译为“三巨头”或“三驾马车”以保持比喻色彩，避免直译“三位一体”可能带来的宗教联想。
保持引言部分的权威性和前瞻性语气。

issues.description: 术语翻译与指南建议不完全一致。指南建议译为‘三巨头’或‘三驾马车’，译文使用了‘三巨头’。但‘trinity’在原文中是一个比喻，指代三个会议构成的整体。译文‘完成了这‘三巨头’的报道’在逻辑上稍显别扭，因为‘三巨头’通常指代三个实体（如三家公司），而这里‘完成报道’的对象是‘ISSCC 2026’这个会议，而非三个会议本身。
译文‘并配有清晰的测量数据和结果’中的‘和结果’为原文‘data’的意译，虽无大碍，但‘数据’本身已隐含‘结果’之意。‘测量数据’已足够清晰，增加‘结果’略显冗余。
根据指南要求，‘首次出现的重要缩写需加注中文全称’。译文直接使用了‘HBM4、LPDDR6、GDDR7 和 NAND’，未在首次出现时提供中文全称或解释。
译文‘涵盖的主题范围广泛，从...到...，以及来自...的先进处理器。’结构清晰。但‘来自联发科、AMD、英伟达和微软等公司的先进处理器’这一长定语可以稍作优化，使其更符合中文将修饰语前置但避免过长的习惯。
译文‘在本综述中，我们将涵盖几个主要类别，例如内存、光网络、高速电气互连和处理器。’中，‘几个’和‘例如’在语义上略有重叠，且‘例如’后的列举是穷举式（对应原文的‘such as’，但中文语境下常直接列举），可以更简洁。

paragraphs.source: In this roundup, we will cover major categories such as Memory, Optical Networking, High-Speed Electrical Interconnects, Processors.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In this roundup, we will cover major categories such as Memory, Optical Networking, High-Speed Electrical Interconnects, Processors.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In this roundup, we will cover major categories such as Memory, Optical Networking, High-Speed Electrical Interconnects, Processors.

pro.text: 本综述将涵盖内存、光网络、高速电气互连和处理器等主要技术领域。
